compounds.frequency: once daily, transitioning to every other day after ~1 month

benefits.description: Tanning effect building noticeably by week 2 or 3 with sun exposure

side_effects.description: Wife experiences mild nausea 15-20 minutes after nasal spray when taken on an empty stomach; resolved by taking after breakfast

protocol_notes: Report covers both the commenter and their wife using nasal spray MT1. Vial is 10mg constituted with 1ml BAC water. Exact mcg per spray not tracked. Protocol: daily spray for ~1 month, then shift to every other day. Wife's nausea mitigated by taking after breakfast.
